description: Style Noteflip flops get a cool makeover this season with this pair of nike Chroma Thong slippers. These slippers add a bold twist to the classic flip-flop design while you flaunt your love for sport, and revel in its comfort.Product DetailsBrown flip flops with synthetic leather thong style straps with brandingA fabric toe separatorSmooth footbed with branding on the heelTPU outsole with herringbone groovesWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and CareSynthetic, rubberWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
